_meta.resume_note: Pinned to Los Angeles Pierce College's official 2025-2026 General Catalog and June 2025 Biology ADT requirements sheet. The Biology A.S.-T. is extracted with all three complete physics-sequence alternatives.

degrees.award_seen: Associate in Science for Transfer Degree (AS-T)
degrees.tmc_version_basis: The 2025-2026 catalog requires Calculus I and one complete two-course physics sequence, matching the prior Biology TMC rather than Biology 2.0.
degrees.catalog_status_seen: Effective Spring 2018, revised Fall 2020, and published as an active award (state code 35979; major code P035979H) in the official 2025-2026 catalog.

sources.locator: Los Angeles Pierce College 2025-2026 General Catalog, Educational Programs, printed page 44, Biology, Associate in Science for Transfer Degree
Official Biology ADT Degree Requirements sheet, published June 2025; required courses, List A, 33-35 major units, and 34-unit Cal-GETC requirement

major_groups.label_seen: List A — select one complete physics sequence
major_groups.choice_structure_seen: Complete PHYSICS 006 and 007 (8 units), PHYSICS 066 and 067 (10 units), or PHYSICS 101 and 102 (10 units); courses may not be mixed across sequences.

courses.title_seen: Physics with Calculus for Life Science Majors I
Physics with Calculus for Life Science Majors II
Physics for Engineers and Scientists I
Physics for Engineers and Scientists II

major_groups.label_seen: CSU-transferable electives as needed to complete 60 units

degrees.notes: The catalog reports 33-35 major units, and the official 2025-2026 requirements sheet reports 34 Cal-GETC units and 60 total CSU-transferable units. The elective subtotal depends on double counting and physics-sequence choice, so it is left null.

notes: The official 2025-2026 catalog and major-code inventory list the general Biology AS-T but no separate general local Biology/Biological Sciences AS or AA; specialty and certificate awards were ignored by scope.
